description: Business letter, perhaps a draft or a copy from a letterbook. Dated: 12 Tammuz 5559 AM, which is 15 July 1799 CE. Dealing mainly with shipments of silk. Neither writer nor addressee are named but scattered fingerprints of the scribe were left when the ink was still drying.
description_he: מכתב עסקי, אולי טיוטה או עתק. תאריך: 12 תמוז תקנ"ט (15 יולי 1799). עוסק בעיקר במשלוחי משי. אין שמות שולח ונמען.
